race.comment: MELBOURNE MAGIC (4) resumes for the Symon Wilde yard and will take beating. Three runs to date have all been good, beaten in a couple of good maidens in town during Winter last year. Expect him to have been wound right up for this. FLYING CAPITAL (3) bumped into a smart one on debut at Geelong but worked home well for second and should come on plenty from that. He'll have map favours (provided the inside is okay by day 3). ATOMOVA (7) stuck on well enough first up at Terang on heavy ground and should strip fitter. She'll take holding out. MIN KIATA (6) ran a much better race here second up at huge odds behind Big Rooster who has been well spruiked in the final race of the day here. He'll take catching off that. BOOL RUSH (1) is aptly named for the Luke Williams yard. Look for any support.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $50,000
